findings.description: Form layout and boxed fields flattened into single column.
findings.evidence: The top half of PDF Page 1 contains a structured layout with distinct boxes for 'DOR Use Only', 'FEIN or SSN', 'ABC Permit Number', etc. The HTML rendering flattens these entirely into a single-column, unstyled list of text labels.

findings.description: Primary table and subsequent content missing from page.
findings.evidence: PDF Page 1 includes a large data entry table ('Number of Gallons...'), a late filing penalty section, a signature block, and instructional paragraphs at the bottom. None of this content appears in the HTML rendering for Page 1.

findings.description: Form footer labels incorrectly rendered as table data rows.
findings.evidence: The HTML table on Page 2 uses the column headers from the main table, but populates the data rows with footer/summary labels ('Gallons Sold (From Page 2)', 'Total Gallons Sold', '1. Late Filing Penalty') which were separate visual elements below the table in the original PDF.

findings.description: Severe disruption of reading order across pages.
findings.evidence: Content that appears at the bottom of PDF Page 1 (Signature line, certification text, instructions, and mailing address) has been shifted entirely to the bottom of HTML Page 2.
